name: Motorsport Games Inc.
summary: PART I Company Overview Motorsport Games Inc. (Motorsport) is a racing game developer, publisher and esports ecosystem provider of official motorsport racing series, including games based on the iconic 24 Hours of Le Mans endurance race (Le Mans) and the associated FIA World Endurance Championship (the WEC). Our portfolio also includes the KartKraft karting simulation game, as well as Studio 397 B.V. (Studio397) and their rFactor 2 realistic racing simulator technology and platform. rFactor 2 al...
